parameters.content:
## 因為 Line 帳戶管理 WebHood 設定的值沒有"-test". 所以這裡用 "Test workflow" 不會觸發. 一定要啟用 "active" 才會有反應.

## 驗證 webhook link :
## https://developers.line.biz/console/channel/2007417077/messaging-api

## 改為 aaa1, aaa2 on 20260108

## Line 相關連結

- Line 開發者頁面 - https://developers.line.biz/console/
- Line 官方帳號 - https://manager.line.biz/
- Line Endpoint - https://api.line.me/v2/bot/message/

parameters.text:
=What's in this image? 如果是一段英文文字,請直接把這一段英文文字翻譯成繁體中文輸出.

所以輸出,一律使用繁體中文回覆. 謝謝.

value.content:
=111 aaa1 星期一:
1. 整理來源影片裡使用的提示詞 並且 理解來源影片連結內容並列出帶有時間線的要點清單
2. 整理來源影片的發展脈絡與關鍵節點
3. (DataTable) 整理來源影片裡使用的提示詞
4. (DataTable) 理解來源影片連結內容並列出帶有時間線的要點清單,用表格輸出結果
5. (DataTable) 理解以下影片連結內容並列出帶有時間線的要點清單。https://youtu.be/xxxxx

6. (資訊圖表) 重點內容:"整份簡報修改,使用Gamma"
7. (Gemini)  請幫我解析這份投影片PDF. 列出每頁的訊息內容以及設計要素, 並以 "---" 區隔每張投影片的內容，以程式碼區塊呈現。
8. 資訊圖表風格  https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/c121851f-87c5-48ba-9213-2955f418d02c

00-default-

 01-董事長風格-

Executive brief style using concise numbered takeaways (1, 2, 3), conclusion-first structure, priority-driven ordering. Visual elements are minimal and aligned to each numbered takeaway, arranged top-to-bottom, then left-to-right, reinforcing decision priority and scan efficiency.

02-資訊設計風格-

Information design style with step-by-step numbered lists (1, 2, 3), instructional tone. Visual elements illustrate each step and follow a strict sequence arranged top-to-bottom, then left-to-right, supporting learning flow and progressive understanding.

03-分析風格-

Analytical report style with strictly ordered numbered hierarchy (1, 1.1, 1.2), logical dependency between points, technical and data-driven tone. Diagrams and visual blocks follow the same hierarchical order, arranged top-to-bottom, then left-to-right, reflecting structural and causal relationships.

04-社論風格-

Editorial layout with clear numbered bullet points (1, 2, 3), balanced short paragraphs and lists, neutral news-style tone, clean typography. Visual elements correspond to each numbered point and are arranged in reading order: top-to-bottom, then left-to-right. Numbers guide both text flow and visual placement.

=aaa2 星期二:
n8n 工作流 Line-Messaging-Webhook URL : https://chenghyang2001.app.n8n.cloud/workflow/ADJplFN2g0aJPlBh

=aaa3 星期三:
Zoom meeting 每周三: 楊政憲
ID: 7774831000
PW: 71301
XXX店長,您好. 以下費用我已經於今天早上付款完成. 如有任何問題，請告知。謝謝。
